title: Fiery Glazed Syrian Sausage Kebabs
description: A keto-friendly Syrian dish featuring German sausages, a sweet and spicy glaze, and a cheese-pull effect, all cooked in a traditional kazan-cauldron.
instructions: Preheat the kazan-cauldron over medium-high heat, adding the olive oil to the bottom.
Thread the German sausage, Halloumi cheese, and garlic onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, ginger, paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to make the glaze.
Brush the glaze onto the sausage and cheese, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers into the kazan-cauldron, searing the sausage for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and continue cooking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sausage is cooked through.
Remove the skewers from the heat and let them rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
